label: Dark Souls
blurb: Lordran to Lothric. Praise the sun, name the speaker, try not to go hollow.

quotes.hint: Arms up, palms open, the pose itself

quotes.q: If only I could be so grossly incandescent!
quotes.hint: Admiring the sun from the Undead Burg

quotes.q: Let us engage in jolly co-operation!
quotes.hint: Handing over his white sign soapstone

quotes.q: The sun is a wondrous body. Like a magnificent father!
Thou who art Undead, art chosen.
quotes.hint: The dying knight who hands you your first Estus

quotes.q: Ashen one, hearest thou my voice, still?
quotes.hint: Waiting at Firelink Shrine, third game

quotes.q: Seek souls. Larger, more powerful souls.
quotes.hint: Majula's guide, telling you the whole gameplay loop

quotes.q: Seek strength. The rest will follow.
alt: Aldia, Scholar of the First Sin
quotes.hint: The Scholar of the First Sin's parting advice

lore.question: What do you rest at to refill your flasks and respawn foes?
What is the healing drink every hollow warrior carries?
lore.hint: Golden, warm, refilled at rest stops

lore.question: Which lord linked the First Flame and started the whole mess?
lore.hint: Lord of Sunlight, later of Cinder

lore.question: Ornstein guards Anor Londo alongside which executioner?
lore.hint: The most infamous boss duo in the series

lore.question: Which covenant do sun-praising jolly co-operators join?
Which knight was swallowed by the Abyss he fought?
lore.hint: His legend credits him with a walk he never finished

lore.question: What title does the third game give the player?
lore.hint: Unkindled, and rude enough to steal cinders

lore.question: What do Undead lose, bit by bit, until they go hollow?
In which city of the gods does the sun turn out to be fake?
lore.hint: Home of a very tall cathedral and a very unfair archer run

lore.question: The ending choice: link the fire, or usher in the Age of what?
